assignments.name: log_entry
assignments.value: ={{ { timestamp: new Date().toISOString(), caller_id: $json.metadata.caller_id, execution_time_ms: $json.metadata.execution_time_ms, enrichment_success: $json.metadata.enrichment_success, data_source: $json.metadata.data_source, account_tier: $json.metadata.account_tier } }}

assignments.name: alert
assignments.value: =PERFORMANCE: Client initiation webhook exceeded 500ms threshold. Caller: {{ $json.metadata.caller_id }}. Execution Time: {{ $json.metadata.execution_time_ms }}ms. Data Source: {{ $json.metadata.data_source }}.

meta.summary: Reusable intake endpoint that assembles client configuration and lookup data.
